name: @mni-ml/framework
description: A TypeScript ML framework with a Rust+CUDA native backend — autograd, tensors, and neural network training at GPU speed.

scripts.build:native: cd native && cargo build --release --features cpu && cp target/release/libmni_framework_native.dylib mni-framework-native.darwin-arm64.node
scripts.build:native:cuda: cd native && cargo build --release --features cuda && cp target/release/libmni_framework_native.so mni-framework-native.linux-x64-gnu.node
scripts.build:all: npm run build:native && npm run build
